note: P0 hotfix on the v189 auto-split capsule payment. The previous splitCapsulePaymentIntoBatches always pushed a full maxChunkStocks even when the remainder was smaller, OVERPAYING every short last chunk. Concrete examples of the v189 bug: 650 SOST with 150-SOST chunks produced 5 × 150 = 750 SOST (overpay 100); 149 SOST with 150-SOST chunks produced [150] (overpay 1). Fixed: the loop now only pushes a full chunk while the remainder STRICTLY exceeds one chunk, then either pushes the leftover as its own chunk or, if the leftover would be under AUTO_SPLIT_MIN_CHUNK_STOCKS AND there is at least one full chunk before it, folds the leftover into that last chunk (sum stays exact, no dust trailing tx). A reduce()-based sum check throws BEFORE any tx build runs if the chunks ever fail to add up to totalStocks. A self-test runs once at script load against 8 reference cases; on failure it disables splitCapsulePaymentIntoBatches with a clear console.error so the wallet refuses to start the auto-split flow rather than overpay silently. Cases verified now: 650/150 → [150,150,150,150,50]; 500/150 → [150,150,150,50]; 300/150 → [150,150]; 150/150 → [150]; 149/150 → [149]; 5/150 → [5]; 1/150 → [1]; 301/150 → [150,151] (dust folded). DO NOT use auto-split on v189 / v190; force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to v191 first.
